{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Aether flows
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Strong local [[Aether flows]] can sustain a livable atmosphere and develop a [[World Spirit]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The flows of the [[Aether]] lead to glory.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Of course it does. The flows of the Aether lead us to glory!”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
